mapper.sql: c.id, c.order_id AS orderId, c.task_id AS taskId, c.reviewer_id AS reviewerId, c.reviewee_id AS revieweeId, c.score, c.content, c.tags, c.create_time AS createTime, t.title AS orderTitle, reviewer.username AS reviewerName, reviewee.username AS revieweeName
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment(order_id, task_id, reviewer_id, reviewee_id, score, content, tags, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{taskId}, #{reviewerId}, #{revieweeId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{tags}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN task t ON c.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user reviewer ON c.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN user reviewee ON c.reviewee_id = reviewee.id WHERE c.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN task t ON c.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user reviewer ON c.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN user reviewee ON c.reviewee_id = reviewee.id WHERE c.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN task t ON c.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user reviewer ON c.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN user reviewee ON c.reviewee_id = reviewee.id WHERE c.reviewer_id = #{reviewerId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN task t ON c.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user reviewer ON c.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN user reviewee ON c.reviewee_id = reviewee.id WHERE c.reviewee_id = #{revieweeId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM comment c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN task t ON c.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user reviewer ON c.reviewer_id = reviewer.id LEFT JOIN user reviewee ON c.reviewee_id = reviewee.id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
